subject: Update execution-workflow.md for structured context and embedded rules
description:
Update `execution-workflow.md` reference to align with the new structured context schema and embedded agent rules pattern. This file transitions from being agent-loaded to documentation-only.

**What to implement:**

1. Read current `claude/sdd-tools/references/execution-workflow.md` (~318 lines)
2. Update Phase 1 (context reading) to describe structured 6-section schema
3. Update Phase 4 (context writing) to describe writing entries under appropriate structured sections
4. Add note that this file is now documentation-only (not loaded by agents at startup)
5. Ensure consistency with embedded rules in task-executor.md (Task 2)
6. Ensure consistency with structured context schema (Task 1)

**Files to modify:**
- `claude/sdd-tools/references/execution-workflow.md` (~318 lines)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] Phase 1 references structured 6-section context reading
- [ ] Phase 4 references structured context writing (entries under section headers, empty sections omitted)
- [ ] File header notes this is documentation-only, not agent-loaded
- [ ] Content is consistent with task-executor.md embedded rules
- [ ] Content is consistent with orchestration.md structured context merge procedures

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] No stale references to old free-form context writing pattern

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Verify consistency across execution-workflow.md, task-executor.md, and orchestration.md
• Integration: Validated during end-to-end execution session (Task 15)

Source: internal/specs/execute-tasks-hardening-SPEC.md Sections 5.6, 5.7
